  constructor
  · -- Assume ctble U, prove ∃ (f : U → Nat), one_to_one f
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨f, hf⟩
    use f
    have h1 : one_to_one f := by

      exact h3
    exact h1

    exact ⟨f, hf⟩
